programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Casey Anthony Story
programme.desc: Two year-old Florida toddler Caylee Anthony vanished in 2008. Her mother Casey Anthony tells investigators that Caylee has been kidnapped by a nanny that no one in the family has seen before.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Arizona Crush
programme.desc: In Arizona, Dave spots a clue that could be evidence of main channel gold before leaving for to an epic prospect in Alaska. But when Jason decides to move the crew off questionable pay, the pressure is on to hit their weekly target.

programme.desc: With a 27-ounce goal, Team Turin is back on the hunt when the Jesse Cut runs dry. In Montana, Dave struggles to find the crew's next lost mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: End Game

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Guide to Love
programme.desc: Reusing funeral flowers for a date, redoing bedrooms with used hotel sheets, buying thrift store lingerie or planning vow renewals for almost nothing, 'Extreme Cheapskates Guide To Love' shows that love doesn't have to cost a thing.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark
programme.desc: Although she's eight months pregnant, Angel frequents local junkyards on a regular basis with her husband Orlando. Mark lives in Las Vegas and yet he manages to not spend a penny of his full time salary.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper
programme.desc: Jamie's entire garden is made up solely of silk flowers. Now, she aims to replace her whole lawn with artificial grass, to eliminate her landscaping bill. Justin tries to land a job in sales, where he promises to save his employer tons of dough.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap: Rather Die Than Pay Retail
programme.desc: The Trans try to help their youngest daughter pursue her modeling dream in their own frugal fashion. The Watsons are planning their daughter's wedding on a $750 budget. The Guileses are trying to renovate their 100-year-old house as cheaply as possible.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Epi
programme.desc: A patient arrives with paralysis in her legs, which spreads up to her arms. An ATV crushes a boy and the hospital doesn't have the right tools to help him. A doctor accidentally injects herself with epinephrine.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Couch Creature
programme.desc: A woman believes her neighbours want to kill her; a man is near death after an arrow pierces his chest; two women with swollen abdomens refuse to explain the cause of their pain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Sleepover Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy at a sleepover party mysteriously loses control over his arms and legs; a woman is shot in the leg at her own bachelorette party, but claims not to know who did it; bubbles in a woman's arteries are causing a stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Heeled!
programme.desc: A man is impaled in his abdomen by a stiletto heel. A seemingly healthy outdoorsman has a series of seizures that baffle his doctors. Two patients make their doctor suspicious when they both complain about identical headaches that started during sex.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Nose No Bounds
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: Hancock
programme.desc: An alcoholic superhero, that alienates the public as he saves their lives, has a chance encounter with a public relations person.

programme.desc: Claire is caught off guard when Phil's father shows up in an RV with a little four-legged friend. Cameron offers to fill in as a drummer for Dylan's band, and Jay and Gloria suffer the consequences when they take Manny to a traumatizing horror movie.

programme.title: Modern Family: Airport 2010
programme.desc: For Jay's birthday, Gloria gives him the best surprise: a romantic getaway to Hawaii. The only kicker is she invited the entire family to come along. Everyone arrives at the airport, and it's quite a scene, filled with forgotten IDs and flying phobias.

programme.title: Modern Family: Hawaii
programme.desc: A relaxing family vacation in Hawaii gets slightly derailed when everyone has their own idea of fun.

programme.title: Modern Family: Family Portrait
programme.desc: Claire painstakingly plans for a new family portrait to be taken, but it seems like everything and everybody is working against her. Gloria and Manny go with Phil and Alex to a Lakers game and end up having a very awkward moment on the jumbotron.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Wagon
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old station wagon, but not before everyone takes it on one last ride down memory lane. Meanwhile, when Mitchell decides to build a life-sized princess castle for Lily, Cameron calls in Jay for support.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Kiss
programme.desc: Gloria decides to cook more traditional Colombian meals, which is met with some ribbing from Jay. Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mom when she learns that Alex likes a boy.

programme.title: Modern Family: Earthquake
programme.desc: An earthquake hits, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with the plumber. Manny experiences an existential crisis while out with Jay, while Mitchell and Cameron use the quake as a way to get out of a brunch party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers on a Treadmill
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell help each other spare their significant others from embarrassment. Jay goes to a Quinceañera to prove a point to Gloria, and Haley gives sisterly advice to Alex.

programme.title: Modern Family: Unplugged
programme.desc: Noticing that everyone is too busy on their electronic devices to actually interact with one another, Claire and Phil declare a family challenge to see who can stay unplugged the longest.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween
programme.desc: Claire loves Halloween and is gearing up to make the Dunphy house spooky for the trick-or-treaters. She gives each family member a role to play, but none of it goes quite right.

programme.title: Modern Family: Chirp
programme.desc: Claire and Haley have a bit of quality girl time while they are home together sick. Meanwhile, Phil becomes preoccupied with the taunts of a chirping smoke detector, and Gloria and Manny surprise Jay at work.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old to New
programme.desc: Guy's in for some old school favourites and new school stunners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multitaskers
programme.desc: A Greek diner is decked out in neon and servin' up family recipes like Yia Yia's grape leaves. In Oxnard, Calif., the jack of all trades joint is baking, brewing and cooking all in the same restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Pork, Poke and Pollo
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to Houston, where he checks out the rotisserie pork at a Greek diner. A poke place in Kahului, HI, is dishin' out fresh fish and turning up the heat on tako, and a Mexican joint in San Francisco makes it all from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Pork, Poke and Pollo

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Only Oranges
programme.desc: It's all about oranges, the magic factor in some of Ina's favourite recipes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases incredible desserts, including a decadent chocolate cake with mocha frosting, sophisticated prunes in armagnac and a crazy-delicious salted caramel sundae with peanut-caramel popcorn and rich chocolate sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fireworks of Flavor
programme.desc: Fourth of July is sparkling with fireworks of flavour from Sunny Anderson's steak supreme to Jeff Mauro's cheesy and spicy Reuben-style brats. Katie Lee makes grilled firework onion appetizers and Michael Symon grills blueberry BBQ chicken.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Parm and Polenta Cake Make Everything Better
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his grilled eggplant parmesan outdoors on the grill and whips up a classic accompaniment with salami and provolone, antipasti salad with campfire dressing.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Ranching Out with Ribs and Corn
programme.desc: Michael Symon turns the flavors of ranch dressing into a rub for Ranch-Rubbed Pork Ribs. He also uses it in Baked Sweet Potatoes with Charred Onion Ranch Dip. Michael's wife, Liz, makes Grilled Corn with Ranchovy Butter, featuring the rub yet again.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Summer Celebration
programme.desc: It's all about summer celebrations in Ree Drummond's ranch kitchen. She starts by making customizable roasted brisket sliders and a big grilled veggie salad, followed by a lemon and berry icebox cake and fizzy sparkling sangria.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboys Who Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is delivering a tailgate lunch to her husband, Ladd, and the cowboys who are out working cattle. She makes Pressure Cooker Pulled Pork Sandwiches and Pickled Jalapenos and Onions for topping them.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Chicken Lovers
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro unearths the best chicken recipes from all the hosts and shares his Alabama White BBQ chicken sandwich. Katie Lee Biegel sets sail with chicken parmesan zucchini boats, and pitmaster Moe Cason stops by to share his Memphis-style chicken.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All-American Clambake
programme.desc: Michael Symon is celebrating the holiday weekend with an All-American clambake with sweet potatoes and corn. Michael also makes his smoked chicken wings to push this festive meal over the top.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Old-School Vegas
programme.desc: Reminiscing over smoky steakhouses and hearty red sauce joints, Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to prepare an old-school Las Vegas meal fit for the Rat Pack.

programme.title: The Grill of Victory: A Day on the Grill
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac challenges three amateur backyard grilling wizards to make breakfast, lunch and dinner on the grill. The competitors have to handle curveballs like making a lunchtime salad trio and a stuffed entree for dinner.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: BBQ Hacks
programme.desc: A true Master of 'Cue must have the ability to handle any challenge or cooking condition, so the competitors have to prove their ability to pivot. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson keep a close eye on their pitmasters.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games, Part 2
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's summer grilling tournament continues with only seven GGG winners remaining. It's all about the boardwalk as the chefs make summer seafood dishes and spicy seaside sandwiches.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Part 3
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's Summer Grillin' Games continue, this time with carnival-themed games and dishes. Guy gives the chefs a funnel cake-sized twist by putting them in pairs to make a fried sweet-and-savoury duo and a cheesy carnival classic.

programme.title: Movie: Alien
programme.desc: The crew of the spaceship Nostromo investigates a signal from a nearby planet, where they discover thousands of strange eggs. What they initially thought was an SOS turns out to be a warning prompting them to leave, but an alien has boarded the ship.

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream

programme.title: Home Town: A Musician's Retreat
programme.desc: A recording producer is back in Laurel looking for an artist's retreat. He received a dilapidated cabin from his late father, and while Ben and Erin are up for the risky restoration challenge, they think he'll get a better return with a bungalow in town.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Gone Fishin' for a Dream Home
programme.desc: After a $250,000 scratch-off win, a couple of empty nesters are finally moving back to her native Mandeville, Louisiana. While they need a fabulous in-law suite and plenty of space for visitors, David also has to find a home with a fishing hole nearby.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Virginia Beach Forever
programme.desc: After serving in the U.S. Air Force for six years, a couple decides to leave Arizona and find their dream home in the military-friendly town of Virginia Beach, Virginia. A life-changing $100,000 settlement is used for a down payment.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: First-Time Forever Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad heads to Dallas, Texas, to meet a couple who won the lottery in life and love! David has to be on his A-game because between this pair's construction and inspection experience, they really know what to look for in their forever dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Make Me a Millionaire
programme.desc: A couple's big win was the break they desperately needed to move out of their cramped basement rental and give their two children a better life. David Bromstad helps them search the suburbs outside Boston for the perfect family dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: From Portland to Paradise
programme.desc: A Portland man was homeless when he inherited $1.4 million after his mother passed away. Now, he and his partner are moving to warm Cape Coral, Florida, and David is ready to find them a house where they can fish, boat and soak up the sunshine in style!

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs vs. the Royal Air Force
programme.desc: The Royal Air Force has been encountering and even engaging UFOs on a regular basis since World War II, but the British government has continuously denied the sightings. Experts investigate why these UFO facts have been concealed.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: American UFO Coverups
programme.desc: Recent news of the Pentagon’s secret UFO program may lead to shocking evidence of what the military has hidden for decades.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Alien Encounters in Area 51
programme.desc: Don investigates to find out why the American government is keeping this top-secret facility confidential and if its purpose is to protect us from our adversaries here on Earth, and the universe.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and the Presidents: FDR to JFK
programme.desc: Investigators reveal the secret history between US Presidents and the UFO phenomenon, from FDR's knowledge about a UFO battle over Los Angeles to JFK's alleged plan to share extraterrestrial secrets with the Russians.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Nazi UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Shocking evidence reveals the development of secret Nazi weapons not long after an alleged UFO crashed in Germany's Black Forest. UFO experts investigate whether the US government co-opted this technology for our own space and military programs.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Day of Days
programme.desc: On D-Day, the planes run into intense German flak and disoriented pilots are forced to drop the troops indiscriminately in the Normandy countryside. The men are separated and must regroup. Winters is now in command.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Carentan

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Crossroads
programme.desc: Winters leads a contingent on a risky mission over a Dutch dike. Heylinger leads a rescue of British soldiers escaping from the besieged town of Arnhem. News comes of a massive German counterattack in the Ardennes Forest and Easy races to hold the line.

programme.title: Band of Brothers: Bastogne

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a beautiful garden turns into a dark abyss, the serenity in Salem, Oregon is shattered. All is not as it seems as investigators dig into the life of a single mom. As the grisly details begin to unfold, the chase is on to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Dark of Night
programme.desc: The joy of Christmas looks bright for a doting Oklahoma Mom. But her kids wake up to a living nightmare when she's inexplicably gone. As investigators track two suspects down a deceitful road, an incendiary break lures the killer out of the dark.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: When Hell Freezes Over
programme.desc: When the car of a Southern California girl is found abandoned, investigators spend years and travel hundreds of miles trying to solve her mysterious disappearance. Finally, an unimaginable backyard discovery by drug agents leads to a vicious killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: A bizarre trail from South Dakota to Minnesota ends in a dark discovery and a case gone cold. While investigators question whether a man of God is the key to solving this mystery, they fear blind faith is not only risky, but could prove to be deadly.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A deadly mystery with deep running roots snakes through a small Alabama town, shattering a young family and baffling the community. Investigators unlock long held Southern secrets to solve a murder and discover a truth steeped in blood and revenge.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Last Call
programme.desc: An unsuspecting field worker makes a horrifying discovery in a backyard orchard and detectives chase down deadly clues. But when a savage killer slips through the cracks, innocent lives are threatened and solving this case is suddenly in jeopardy.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: When a construction worker unearths some human remains in the backyard of an old farmhouse, it sets off a baffling fifteen-year missing person's case and leaves detectives searching for long buried secrets and overdue justice.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Guilt Or Innocence
programme.desc: When the body parts of two missing teens are found in a backyard cornfield, Ohio detectives uncover dark family secrets to track their suspect. The community fears there may never be justice when the man convicted of the crime is released from prison.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The House on Canyon Road
programme.desc: The gruesome discovery of a skeletonized and dismembered corpse buried in the backyard of a Seattle home results in an investigation that unravels a 30-year-old murder plot hatched by a scheming, vindictive family.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: Hannah Hill disappeared from her home in Akron, Ohio in the spring of 1999. One week later Hannah's body was found in the trunk of her own car on the side of the road.

programme.title: Dateline: The Farm
programme.desc: A murder outside of Pleasantville, Iowa divides a family and forces one man to take the investigation into his own hands.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Exhumed: Cold Case, Unearthed
programme.desc: Marilyn McIntyre's gruesome murder goes unsolved for decades, until a phone call resurrects the investigation. Is it possible evidence is buried with the victim? After thirty years underground, does it still exist?

programme.title: Exhumed: Mail Order Murder
programme.desc: An unconventional love story ends in murder when a mail-order bride disappears without a trace. Detectives discover that someone closest to her has a suspicious past, and only an exhumation can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Exhumed: Evil Deception
programme.desc: Weeks from giving birth, Meg Purk is found dead in her home of an apparent suicide. Did Meg really kill herself and her unborn baby, or is the truth more horrible than anyone can imagine? It will take an exhumation to unearth the truth.

programme.title: Exhumed: A Murderer Among Us
programme.desc: When grandmother Erma Prince dies after a simple hip surgery, fears spread that a killer nurse could be responsible. The police do everything they can to track down the killer including exhuming Erma's body.

programme.title: Exhumed: Bones of Truth
programme.desc: Mystery shrouds the disappearance of wife and mother Danna Dever. Could the discovery of skeletal remains in a California prairie be the key to finding out what happened? An exhumation might just reveal the truth.

programme.title: Exhumed: Deadly Generosity
programme.desc: A year after Diana Burrow died of natural causes, a rumor began to spread in the small town of St. Pauls, NC that Diana was murdered. With no evidence obtained from the crime scene, officials have little to investigate unless they exhume her body.

programme.title: Exhumed: Poison in the Plot
programme.desc: A beloved wife finds her husband dead of an apparent suicide by poisoning. Suspicious detectives must exhume the body of her first husband to unearth the truth and discover a diabolical plot devised by a lovelorn 'Black Widow.'

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII

programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Just One of the Boyz 4 Now for Now
programme.desc: Convinced she's met the love of her life, Tina decides to disguise herself as a boy and sneak into the Boyz 4 Now auditions to find him. Back at the restaurant, Teddy asks the rest of the Belcher gang to nurse his baby rat back to health.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Taking of Funtime One Two Three
programme.desc: Desperate for the grand prize dune buggy at their local arcade, Louise, Tina and Gene devise a master plan, with the help of Mr. Fischoeder. Meanwhile, Teddy manages to convince Bob and Linda to take in a chicken by promising fresh eggs.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Darmok
programme.desc: The Enterprise meets with a Tamarian ship, known for an unusual means of communication. The alien captain abducts Picard to a nearby planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Ensign Ro
programme.desc: Picard suspects a high-level Federation conspiracy when he receives new orders.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Silicon Avatar
programme.desc: Picard struggles to communicate with a mysterious and destructive force.

programme.title: Movie: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: Movie: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Silicon Avatar

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant

programme.title: Attenborough's Journey
programme.desc: As Sir David Attenborough enters his 94th year, this unique film presents a remarkable portrait of the man behind the legend.

programme.title: Planet Earth: A Celebration
programme.desc: This program highlights eight of the most extraordinary sequences from 'Planet Earth II' and 'Blue Planet II.' In addition to new narration, the sequences will include an arrangement of original scores from composer Hans Zimmer and Jacob Shea.

programme.title: Life Story: First Steps
programme.desc: Each and every animal is born with a chance to survive, thrive and produce their very own next generation. The first hurdle in life is infancy.

programme.title: Life Story: Growing Up
programme.desc: In the journey towards adulthood, a moment comes for all animals when they must strike out on their own.

programme.title: Life Story: Home
programme.desc: To survive, animals need somewhere to live, a place that provides the necessities of life, shelter from the elements and refuge from enemies.

programme.title: Life Story: Power
programme.desc: An individual's life journey interweaves with many others. Those who are successful know when to fight or back down, when to cooperate or to go it alone and how to manipulate and deceive.

programme.title: Life Story: Courtship
programme.desc: Competition to win a partner has created both the most extraordinary beauty and life-threatening violence found anywhere in nature. The stakes could not be higher: without a mate, the journey of life ends.

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Fish

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Pacific Terror
programme.desc: When Detective Molly Daul works two homicides back to back, she realizes she's dealing with a sexual predator who targets trusting young women. Arrested before he can kill again in Seattle, his chilling confession remains with Molly to this day.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Frozen Tears
programme.desc: Pretty pre-teen Rosie Davenport is found brutally murdered in an abandoned house, the circumstances of her death eerily similar to the unsolved murder of 13-year-old Malissa Thomas one year earlier.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: Relentless: discovery+ Sneak Peek: The Two Christinas
programme.desc: Christina Whittaker, twenty-one, vanishes without a trace, but her mother Cindy refuses to give up hope. Filmmaker Christina Fontana pledges to find the truth about their missing daughter, but as she digs deeper, it's clear nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Disappeared: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: A young man gets life-changing news and drops everything to start a new chapter. But when he never calls home again his family knows something is wrong. Police begin to investigate but encounter a tangled web of contradictory stories.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Serial Confessions
programme.desc: Watch and hear the shocking confession of a real estate agent turned serial killer and a stunning rescue video of a woman held hostage in a shipping container.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: Relentless: discovery+ Sneak Peek: The Two Christinas
programme.desc: Christina Whittaker, twenty-one, vanishes without a trace, but her mother Cindy refuses to give up hope. Filmmaker Christina Fontana pledges to find the truth about their missing daughter, but as she digs deeper, it's clear nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Disappeared: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: A young man gets life-changing news and drops everything to start a new chapter. But when he never calls home again his family knows something is wrong. Police begin to investigate but encounter a tangled web of contradictory stories.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: A teenager said after he killed an elderly couple that 'it felt amazing.' Now a controversial law could set him free at age 25.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Nurse
programme.desc: Bright young nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. An old friend of hers points a finger at Michelle's ex-boyfriend. Cops discover footage that shows Michelle's car driving around the parking lot where she vanished, but who is the driver?

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: True Conviction: Drive to Kill
programme.desc: Cindy Albrecht, the head chef for one of the racing world's top teams, goes missing from her home near the INDY 500 and as the suspects start piling up it becomes a race against time.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Long Road to Justice
programme.desc: Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi meets the detective and prosecutor who took on the case of Karen Ann Watson, a wife and mother who was brutally stabbed to death. Nearly 30 years after the crime, they track down a killer who thinks he got away with murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures. When investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Evil Eye
programme.desc: Not long after Patrick Brown falls for a woman named Cece, he is plagued by mysterious phone calls and a creepy sense that someone is watching him. He begins to wonder if it might be a figment of his imagination.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: I Forgive You
programme.desc: In 2003, a young man in Georgia shoots his father in the head sixteen times. Days later, the dismembered body of a nun turns up on the side of a Virginia road. The story behind these two crimes haunts those involved to this day.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: A look back at crime cases where questions remain unanswered.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Web of Spies
programme.desc: When her fairytale marriage crumbles, a young mother questions just what kind of family she married into. A bitter custody battle leads to a vicious cyberstalking campaign with devastating real life consequences.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Nicole White is in the middle of a bitter custody battle when she vanishes. Suspicion falls on an online date until her husband turns up unexpectedly with his face scratched.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Killing Field
programme.desc: In February, a teenage couple mysteriously disappears leaving two families devastated. When their car turns up abandoned and burnt in a field, everyone's desperate for answers. But winter's thaw reveals the hideous truth that shocks the community.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Hit Homes on Halloween
programme.desc: Desperate for their next high, Michael Kidd, Kevin Crandall, and Marcus Thompson join forces on Halloween night to break into upscale homes in search of cash. But the crime spree becomes a terrifying hostage situation when they commit a home invasion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped
programme.desc: The main suspect in the murder of a pregnant ex-girlfriend, and wanted for the shooting of a current one, Michael Alfonso is a jealous boyfriend who time and again turns to violence. It is Alfonso's criminal lifestyle that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make a Dummy Out of Sheets
programme.desc: While facing five life sentences for a spree of Florida robberies, Frankie Lee Bass makes a daring escape and goes on the run.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Special OPS

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: As Seen on TV/ Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Krabs makes a low-budget commercial; accused of stealing, Squidward quits his job.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: My Sharon-Ah
programme.desc: Brendar faces off against a Royal Order rival, but the result casts doubt about her ability to complete her ultimate quest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: How To Use A Frozen Krabby Patty
programme.desc: The Frozen Krabby Patty is now for more than eating!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Lead/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Thug Loaf/ Mine All Mine
programme.desc: When SwaySway and Buhdeuce deliver bread to the bad part of Duck Town, things go from quazy to quazier. Then, SwaySway and Buhdeuce meet the most righteous dude in the planet: the Bread Maker.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Monkey Brains
programme.desc: Donatello and April uncover a conspiracy involving a psychic monkey.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Never Say Xever
programme.desc: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gauntlet
programme.desc: April gets a warning from her imprisoned father, and she and the turtles go on a mission to stop Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb on the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Panic in the Sewers
programme.desc: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

programme.title: Young Dylan: The Gift
programme.desc: Dylan has a dream about his mom returning to get him, and reveals that he doesn't want to leave. This becomes a reality when Viola reveals that Dylan's mom is back, and planning to take Dylan home with her.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Food for the Soul
programme.desc: A family's world is upended when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in.

programme.title: Young Dylan: My Fair Charlie
programme.desc: A family's world is upended when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in.

programme.title: Young Dylan: A Tale of Two Rappers
programme.desc: A family's world is upended when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Lil' Dynomite
programme.desc: When Danger Force accidentally forgets about plans they have with Ray, he surprises them with a brand new member of the team to make them jealous.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: A surprise from Schowz's mom might cause Mika to fail her test on not snitching.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Texas Weiners/ YooHooTube
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are tasked with driving to pick up 1,000 hot dogs for a birthday party. To save Schwoz from an experiment gone wrong, Captain Man and Kid Danger must follow instructions he posted online.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Invisible Brad
programme.desc: Captain Man's friend Brad, who years ago was accidentally turned invisible, shows up to visit but quickly overstays his welcome.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Elevator Kiss
programme.desc: Bianca and Kid Danger share a kiss when he saves her. Henry is ok with it until he realises Bianca kissed Kid Danger instead of him.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Bucket Trap
programme.desc: Henry and Charlotte want to tell Jasper that Henry is really Kid Danger. They decide to give Jasper a test secret to prove he's ready.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Dream Busters
programme.desc: A villain's 'dream beam' traps Henry in a crazy dream state that only Charlotte can rescue him from.

programme.title: Danger Force: Twin It to Win It
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Monsty
programme.desc: When Mika tries too hard to win Man’s Nest Employee of The Month, she creates a monster that could ruin the telethon Danger Force is hosting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: Night Drivers/ Return to Wartwood
programme.desc: Ignoring Anne's and Hop Pop's warnings about the dangers of night driving, Sprig and Polly stay up all night to drive the family home. Then, The Plantar's come up with a plan after learning they forgot to bring gifts.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!
programme.desc: In this special extended episode, Anne and the Plantars protect themselves from the dangers of the annual Blue Moon by locking themselves in the house and entertaining each other with the scariest stories they can think of.

programme.title: Amphibia: Ivy on the Run/ After the Rain
programme.desc: Fed up with her mother's strict rules, Ivy devises a plan to run away. Then, Anne asks Hop Pop to retrieve the music box, bringing some long-buried secrets to light.

programme.title: Amphibia: The First Temple
programme.desc: Marcy, Anne and the Plantars travel to an ancient temple that could hold the key to getting Anne and Marcy home, but only if they can survive the temple's deadly challenges.

programme.title: Amphibia: New Wartwood/ Friend or Frobo
programme.desc: Intent on winning over Wartwood, Marcy makes a plan to improve the town. Then, Desperate for fun, Polly breaks out and finds an unlikely new friend in the process.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad to Redemption/ Maddie & Marcy
programme.desc: Mayor Toadstool is offered his dream job but realizes he doesn’t want to leave Wartwood. Maddie is working on an important spell, but her three sisters keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Picture This/ Nerdy Dancin'
programme.desc: The boys build a transport device so that they can retrieve Ferb's skateboard from England. Candice asks Jeremy to be her dance partner in a dance show, but Jeremy can't dance.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Just Passing Through/ Candace's Big Day
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create an orb that allows them to pass through solid objects and to ultimately, help them retrieve Mom's favourite guitar pick for her gig at the Mayor's Day Festival.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Twilight Sword
Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Party Like it's 2099
Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Time to Collect
Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rollercoaster in their backyard, Candace tries to bust them by getting their mom to return from the grocery store early, and Dr. Doofenshmirtz attempts to pull the Eastern Seaboard to the west using tinfoil and a giant magnet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower

programme.desc: The GOATS reflect on their sports, and the meaning of their careers, mixing pride with loss. Walter caps his own career with the last photo shoot with Ali and Frazier together in a night to remember: the GOATS of the 20th century.

programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Brownsville
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Fort Benning
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Bowman
programme.desc: Get to know the good people of the south through experiencing southern food and culture.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: SEC Storied: In Search of Derrick Thomas
programme.desc: Derrick Thomas was a legendary college pass rusher and talented linebacker in the NFL before an accident at 33 years old took his life. See how his legacy continues to influence the world years later.

programme.desc: A babysitter returns from her senior year at college and accepts a job. While working, she uncovers what she thinks is a murder plot over the baby-monitor.
