programme.desc: A high-school student is being blackmailed by her cousin in order to improve test scores. When she tries to break free of her cousin’s hold, she unleashes a chain of events that may prove deadly.

programme.title: Movie: Young, Stalked and Pregnant
programme.desc: A teenager finds herself pregnant after being accepted to a top university. She is determined to have the future she wanted, but her boyfriend cannot accept this and decides to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie: Secrets of a Marine's Wife
programme.desc: Based on the true story of 19-year-old Erin Corwin, who was married to U.S. Marine Corporal Jon Corwin and expecting her first child, when she suddenly went missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Itching for Revenge
programme.desc: Spotting nutria tracks, Matt wants revenge and his next meal. Jeff uses ingenuity to create a one-of-a-kind swamp smoker. Amber's fishing skills have her team well-fed, but an injury from her military service threatens her challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: EJ's Ball and Pain
programme.desc: A brutal injury threatens EJ's challenge and manhood. Jeff and Steven are stalked by a territorial black bear. Rylie, Matt and Ryan land their second huge win of the challenge. Max and Gary plan a risky raid of an active beehive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: EJ's Ball and Pain
programme.desc: A brutal injury threatens EJ's challenge and manhood. Jeff and Steven are stalked by a territorial black bear. Rylie, Matt and Ryan land their second huge win of the challenge. Max and Gary plan a risky raid of an active beehive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Bridge Over Swampy Water
programme.desc: To cross the gator-filled swamp, Rylie, Matt and Ryan engineer an epic 50-foot bridge in a desperate attempt for resources. Harassed by a black bear, Jeff and Steven must abandon their camp. EJ stalks a gator who has been stealing his fish.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Feast of The Eyes
programme.desc: An eye-popping decision bordering on reckless puts a survivalist's challenge at risk. Two camps go head-to-head when one team sabotages the other's hunt. A tribe begins an epic project to take on the swamp, building a primitive canoe from a downed log.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Cold Grudges Die Hard
programme.desc: Sub-freezing temperatures descend on the swamp, putting two survivalists on the brink. Rylie finally resolves lingering resentment from a past challenge. Desperate for more resources, Max and EJ see if their canoe can take them to better hunting grounds.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: All in to Get Out
programme.desc: Days from the end of their 60-day challenge, the remaining survivalists join forces against the frigid swamp. Desperate for a big kill, all seven go on an epic group hunt. During extraction, a vessel takes on water and puts a pair at risk for hypothermia.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: With half the crab boats tied up, Sig devises a plan to save the fishery from destruction. As Bering Sea legend Johnathan Hillstrand returns with the Time Bandit to help, veterans struggle to prove they can work together to defend the American dream.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Drag Boat Disaster, Swinging Bridge
programme.desc: A racer modifies his drag boat-almost costing his life; two storm chasers are trapped by a tornado; passengers flee an exploding plane; a military plane crashes and one of the most infamous bridges disintegrates.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Power of Protein
programme.desc: Health-conscious George sends Tamara to investigate the discovery and innovation of whey protein. Tamara recruits an "everyday athlete" to take a protein and exercise challenge - will he be proof of how whey boosts nutrition?

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Tails and Teeth
programme.desc: Ali and Brandon Nelson search for kelp paddies when they get some unexpected weather.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Fiery Plane, Massive Landslide
programme.desc: Clips include a Naval pilot bailing out of a crippled plane moments before crashing; two men outrun a destructive mudslide, a tornado sends cars flying and a police dash cam catches a tanker truck fire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: A Golden Opportunity
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue the Kramers in Alaska by converting an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is suddenly forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates joins the hunt for a $2,000,000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Eggs Lipoma
programme.desc: David is back to see Dr. Lee after she spotted a suspicious growth under his eye. Nicole is depressed because of the bumps all over her neck. Steve has a noticeable lump on his forehead. Allen has a growth on his bicep but is terrified of doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Fault in Our Scars
programme.desc: James has a large, squishy lump on his forehead. Tanisha has a growth on her arm and itchy scars all over her body. Ed wants his stomach lump removed before his girlfriend gets out of prison. Justin has painful mystery bumps all over his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Comedone Sail Away
programme.desc: JD is a gentle giant with a pear-shaped mass hanging off of his ear. David has two bumps on his neck and one on his finger that give him pain. Former cruise ship worker Julie hopes Dr. Lee can remove her large back growth so she can return to the sea.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!
programme.desc: Audrey pops the painful bumps that cover her body so she can feel relief. Felicia has a peculiar looking dark growth on her forehead. Krista's excessive sweating is so severe that on any given day she could fill up an entire milk jug with her sweat.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Part 4
programme.desc: Guy Fieri treats the remaining five chefs to a Flavortown vacation, and one chef's destination dinner has a chance to earn 'Best Dish' an instant $5,000 and a spot in the finale. Then, the bottom four chefs compete to see whose trip will get cut short.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games Finale
programme.desc: For the four chefs in Guy Fieri's summer bash finale, a beach ball determines which aisles the chefs get to shop for their summertime guilty pleasure. Then, they find feature ingredients for their ultimate grilled feast in an epic scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Legends
programme.desc: There's a long list of off-the-chain barbecue joints in the DDD history books, and Guy's hand-picked some of his all-time favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Dakota Smorgasbord
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting Triple-D's 50th state as he heads into Sioux Falls, SD, where a spot is taking chislic to the next level, and he finds the state's first Ethiopian joint. Plus, a Midwest-Southern mashup is putting their own stamp on comfort cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Authentic to Inventive
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is divin' into dishes from real deal to really creative. In Portland, OR., a 70-year-old icon is serving up authentic recipes from the chef's Chinese hometown, and a jammin' joint in Oklahoma City is getting groovy with chicken and biscuits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law are carrying on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo is running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honour of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wonder Women
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting an all-female lineup that's rockin' the house. In Houston, a grandma's firing up family recipes like homemade tamales and chile rellenos with a twist. In Orlando, Florida, a funky spot is focused on making meatball masterpieces.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot
programme.desc: Guy hits the surf 'n' turf jackpot in Mississippi and Oahu. He tries some tasty ribs, fritters as well as pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Massachusetts Madness
programme.desc: Guy's grubbin' from one end of Massachusetts to the other, fillin' up the tank with stuffed specialties.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Fireworks Make the World Go Round
programme.desc: Valerie is celebrating our nation's birthday with a sparkling menu that's sure to pop!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bayou Bash Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites Louisiana native and actress Faith Ford over for a brunch that makes them feel like they're in the Big Easy. Valerie makes green tomato Benedict and easy cajun hollandaise, olive salad, hurricane mimosas and bananas foster.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fourth Of July
programme.desc: Hundreds of guests are invited to the ranch, and Ree's keeping it effortless and easy.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Meals: Cowboy Favorites
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing 16-minute favorites for cowboys and cowgirls, too. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, gnocchi with chorizo and corn, crisp in a pinch and finally a chicken jalapeno popper quesadilla.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Wedding on the Ranch
programme.desc: Join the guest list to the fabulous frontier wedding as Ree Drummond’s daughter Alex Drummond marries her college sweetheart Mauricio Scott.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Souping and Sleepovers
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a cozy lunch of miso ramen then having a mother-kiddo sleepover. For the party, Molly serves her spicy ranch snack mix, ooey-gooey pesto pizza pillows and a showstopping blueberry doll cake bedazzled with sprinkles.

programme.title: Valerie's Hot Dish: Valerie's Hot Dish

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Heating Up with Jason Isbell and Amanda Shires

programme.title: The Kitchen: Star-spangled Spread
programme.desc: The Kitchen is whipping up a showstopping, star-spangled spread for the 4th of July. Jeff is cooking up grilled triple decker hot dog sandwich and Sunny makes all-American cola-glazed short ribs. The hosts also share dips, drinks and DIY decor.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Battle America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings in chefs from the four corners of the U.S. to see which region has the tastiest food. He starts off the competition by asking the chefs to cook their best regional sandwich, but on a budget.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Grillin' at Home

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grill Or Be Grilled
programme.desc: It's a special all-grilling episode of Guy's Grocery Games where chefs have to first get through Guy's dice game. Next, they will have to grill seafood and create a feast that uses only six pounds of ingredients. Finally, they play Spreeball to win items.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.desc: Coy and Kenya are moving to town to be close to their children and grandchildren. As empty nesters, they want to downsize into a historic cottage with an all-in budget of $125,000.

programme.title: Home Town: A Vacation Every Day

programme.title: Home Town: The Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: A man who has always moved around and loves to travel and meet new people is looking for a large home. Ben and Erin can't believe their luck when he gives them a limitless budget to design a gorgeous retreat with a Spanish-style kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: Colourful Custom Cottage

programme.title: Home Town: Porch Dreams

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life Awaits

programme.title: Home Town: There's Just Something About a Porch

programme.title: Home Town: Color Psychology

programme.title: Home Town: Small Budget, Big Style

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: They Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot's cosmic origins. An Air Force veteran receives a shocking response when he reports UFO activity over Fairbanks. Piercing lights from above disrupt a late-night party near Wasilla, Alaska.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: The Mother Ship
programme.desc: An amateur photographer captures floating orbs on camera. UFOs circle a larger, egg-shaped mother ship floating high above Anchorage. A brother and sister watch in awe as a massive aircraft disappears behind a mountain range.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: The Search for Lizzie Borden

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: Sea Witch
programme.desc: A bloody encounter with an aggressive spirit leads the caretaker of the USS Salem to call on Amy Bruni and Adam Berry to investigate the massive Navy destroyer. A late-in-the-game realization by psychic medium Chip Coffey may solve this troubling haunt.

programme.desc: Photographic evidence of injured paranormal investigators spurs Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey to investigate a dark presence in a Victorian mansion. The team suspects a recently unearthed graveyard may have triggered the ghostly activity.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: Resurrected: Fire Starter

programme.desc: Amy Bruni and Adam Berry head to Tennessee to investigate Hales Bar Dam, a location cursed by a chieftain warlord. Centuries later the curse still wreaks havoc on the land, and the current owner fears an evil entity is out for revenge.

programme.title: Greatest Steaks of America

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present
programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. He must try to piece together his mysterious past while eluding assassins.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Yacht in Kneed
programme.desc: Captain Sandy returns to Croatia at the helm of the mega-yacht Lady Michelle in hopes of guiding a new team through calmer waters along the stunning Dalmatian Coast. An accomplished yachtie, Katie joins as Captain Sandy's first new Chief Stew in years.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. He must try to piece together his mysterious past while eluding assassins.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: A former CIA assassin from an experimental top-secret program resorts to his training when he is framed for a botched CIA operation.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: As government agents continue to track him down, Jason Bourne searches for his identity by going back to where his journey all began.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: Ryan's Renovation: Brownstone Milestone
programme.desc: Follow Ryan and his wife Emilia renovate their 7,900 square foot townhouse.

programme.title: Top Chef Amateurs: Breaking the Curse
programme.desc: A young grad student goes against a seasoned writer with the help of Top Chef All-Stars, Richard Blais and Melissa King, hoping to impress the judges by creating crave-able dishes using infamous ingredients - scallops and risotto.

programme.title: Top Chef Amateurs: Absolutely Radishing
programme.desc: A pharmacist and a pharmaceutical sales rep must 'root out' the flavors in a variety of radishes and work with Top Chef alums, Kwame Onwuachi and Shirley Chung, to win over the palates of the judges.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Mirror/ Cricket's Tickets

programme.title: Jessie: Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation

programme.title: Jessie: Tempest in a Teacup

programme.title: Jessie: Romancing the Crone

programme.desc: Satellite images capture a strange arrangement of white objects on a remote military base in Washington State. Experts investigate and uncover super-sized storage containers that may have a disturbing purpose on a facility with a deadly legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gate to the Viking Gods
programme.desc: New evidence reveals dozens of bizarre circular structures buried in the remote hills of Norway. An expert investigation uncovers a mysterious burial ground that may have been a portal to the Viking spiritual realm.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: MythBusters: Hypermiling/ Crash Cusions
programme.desc: The MythBusters test whether a guy sandwiched between two big guys in the backseat of a car could survive the car being T-boned by a truck.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape Hour
programme.desc: The team is rolling out their sticky carpet to tackle a trio of duct tape myths.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: MythBusters: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: The MythBusters tackle some of Hollywood's favourite explosive scenarios. Find out if a hero could really shoot a live grenade in midair and thus render it useless. Also, see if you could really contain a TNT explosion inside a file cabinet or aquarium.

programme.title: MythBusters: The Explosion Special
programme.desc: In their farewell season, Adam and Jamie go out with a bang. They bid farewell to their favourite pastime with two explosive tall tales.

programme.title: MythBusters: Supersonic Ping Pong/ Ice Cannon
programme.desc: In this ballistics bonanza, Adam and Jamie ask if supersonic ping pong can go lethally wrong, while Kari, Grant and Tory light the frozen fuse on a cannon made of ice!

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape Canyon
programme.desc: Lost in the wilderness, Adam and Jamie survive the desert, repel down canyon cliff-faces, and brave Class 5 rapids, all with duct tape and bubble wrap.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape: The Return
programme.desc: The MythBusters build a trebuchet and attempt to save Buster's life with their favorite mechanical cure all: Duct Tape.

programme.title: MythBusters: Accidental Ammo
programme.desc: Stand by for some ballistic backyard bedlam and a gruesome glass guillotine in an episode devoted to accidental ammo.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Widows of Winter
programme.desc: 74-year-old widow Virginia Johannessen is shot dead in her home; then, another widow is murdered on the same street. Is someone targeting widows on Felton Road? As police unravel the truth, they discover they've made a chilling mistake.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Weeks after the Christmas disappearance of 22-year-old Dean Fawcett, detectives discover a headless body in the snow. A handwritten note points to a dangerous set of suspects, setting investigators on a cross-country manhunt to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: A frigid winter hovers over St Paul, Minnesota. 30 year old Kira Steger hasn't reported to work and her family and friends are terrified she might be in danger. Her disappearance leads to a three month investigation that halts to a heartbreaking ending.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter's Nightmare
programme.desc: An entire family vanishes in the dead of winter from Nebraska. Have they suddenly decided to skip town, or has something far worse happened? A daughter's relentless search helps cops uncover a sinister and deadly plot fueled by revenge and greed.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: A brutal murder and frozen crime scene shatter an idyllic Idaho town. A suspect's bizarre confession has police hoping for a quick resolution, but all is not what it seems. They must find an attacker with a gruesome MO before he strikes again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.desc: Oklahoma wild animal zookeeper Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison and intensifies his feud with Carole Baskin, while the jury foreman exclusively explains the guilty verdict and an investigation reveals Carole's husband's will may be a forgery.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend believes Carole cares more about her animals than most people, while a former homicide cop explores property transfers from Carole to handyman Kenneth Farr and searches a lake for Don's body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards

programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Invasion of the Ferb Snatchers/ Ain't No Kiddie Ride
programme.desc: After an all night science-fiction movie marathon, Candace is convinced that Ferb is an alien and gathers evidence to prove it. The boys admit that they are doing something for an alien but that Ferb is not one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: While cleaning the house, the two brothers inadvertently send Candace away.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb-Busters!/ Not Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: Irving's brother, Albert, claims to be the 'Truth Detector' and Candice enlists friends.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo
programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Summer Belongs to You
programme.desc: It's the summer solstice and, since it's the longest day of the year, Phineas and Ferb decide to travel around the world in just one day. Not everyone believes in them, but they get some encouraging words from an unlikely pair.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Blackout!/ What'd I Miss?
programme.desc: Candace is put in charge of the boys right before the entire city loses electricity and they use the opportunity to make the most out of the blackout. Phineas and the gang try training domesticated squirrels to live in the wild.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower
Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: The Big Battle for Battleworld
Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: An Island of Spiders
Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: Marvel Battleworld: Treachery at Twilight: Portal to the Collector's Tower

programme.title: Football Is Us: The College Game
programme.desc: In exploring the sport from the first game in 1869 to the present day, take a deep dive into central topics of college football. Some of the sport's major stars are featured including Jerry Rice, Barry Switzer, Nick Saban, Andre Ware and more.

programme.title: The Greatest: Mascots
programme.desc: In college football, mascots are an unlikely piece of serious business. These are the top 11 live animals, cartoon creations, and everything in between, in a fun breakdown of one of the sport's most enjoyable traditions.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: The Greatest: Innovations
programme.desc: College football has continually evolved and innovated in ways that have made the game safer, more entertaining, and more exciting. These are the top 11 innovations that have impacted the sport's history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Walk-Ons
programme.desc: There's a difference, it turns out, between impossible and improbable. In college football's long history, there have been a handful of incredible stories of walk-ons who became stars. These are the top 11 of all time.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Shockwave
programme.desc: After discovering the identity of the bomber her division has been searching for, Sharon Raydor and the Major Crimes squad struggle to determine his next target.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sanctuary City
programme.desc: When three 15-year-old boys vanish from a Catholic school field trip, new Asst. Chief Mason orders Major Crimes to treat their disappearance as a critical missing. Meanwhile, Sharon receives more evidence that Phillip may be returning to L.A.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Casey Anthony Story
programme.desc: Two year-old Florida toddler Caylee Anthony vanished in 2008. Her mother Casey Anthony tells investigators that Caylee has been kidnapped by a nanny that no one in the family has seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Revealing Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to Africa to get up close and personal with a distant relative and scale dangerous cliffs all to answer where humans came from.

programme.title: Expedition: Back to the Future: Josh's Adventure of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an unprecedented journey to hunt down the original DeLorean Time Machine from Back to the Future. Along with Christopher Lloyd, the two scour iconic Hollywood locations searching for the coveted car.

programme.title: Expedition: Back to the Future: DeLorean Debacle
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd track down Bob Gale, creator of Back to the Future, and discover that their hunt for a Time Machine will take them to a super-fan's collection in Massachusetts and DeLorean's HQ in Texas.

programme.title: Expedition: Back to the Future: Almost Outta Time
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd's mission to hunt down an original DeLorean Time Machine takes them to Orlando, where they finally believe they've finally found the right car, but instead, they are hit with an unexpected problem.

programme.title: Expedition: Back to the Future: Great Josh!
programme.desc: Josh Gates and Christopher Lloyd's hunt for an original DeLorean Time Machine has taken an unexpected turn, forcing them to scramble. But with the help of an expert builder and the car's original designer, they hope to make the delivery on time.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Copper Scroll
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Off Track, on Course
programme.desc: Winning SEMA could take their business and Brad's racing to the next level. Aiming for Best in Show, The Debertis' convert a brand new 2018 Mustang into the ultimate custom ride while Brad takes his first step back into Pro-Lite.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Race to the Top
programme.desc: The DeBertis race to finish the 2018 Mustang for SEMA, where a chance encounter with Joey Logano could jump-start Brad's racing career.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: NASCAR Dreams
programme.desc: The Deberti's convert an F-150 into an off-road beast for NASCAR's Joey Logano. In exchange, Joey teaches Brad how to drive on asphalt, which means that truck build has to be perfect.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Hoping to move up the list, racers find new ways to get their callouts in. JJ and Ryan talk about making a deal.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: America's List: The Hard Way
programme.desc: As the racers move into the second half of the season, Chief gets a rematch against Kye, Daddy Dave continues to battle car issues and one racer learns the limits of the road the hard way.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Fresh Meat
programme.desc: When Brandon James pulls out, he paves the way for Detroit's Jake Blaine to call out the list. Murder Nova makes moves towards the top and Axman tries to ward off challengers.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: No More Mr. Nice Man
programme.desc: With the season quickly winding down, everyone is feeling the pressure to move up the list. That includes the top racers, and after Big Chief and Axman race for number one, things get explosive.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Full Throttle: Give Him the Bird
programme.desc: Not everyone can move up, and this week it has a lot of the racers on edge. Jerry Bird starts to feel like the list is stacked against him and when a racer hides from Jason Cantu long enough to spoil his plans, he takes revenge into his own hands.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: America's List: Full Throttle: Give Him the Bird
programme.desc: Racers are on edge feeling like they can't move up including Jerry Bird who thinks the list is stacked against him. Jason Cantu's plans are spoiled so he takes revenge into his own hands.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK: The No to the Yes Show
programme.desc: Brides get a lesson in saying 'Yes' when they want to say 'No.'

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK: The Asset Management Show
programme.desc: Katy dreamed of wearing a princess dress to her wedding, and her options are unlimited now that she's had a breast reduction.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK: The First Time Shoppers Show
programme.desc: If it's a bride's first time shopping, she might not know where to start or she may know exactly what she wants. Either way, the consultation can get tricky when disagreements with her entourage arise.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK: The Princess Diana Show
programme.desc: From shy Di to the Queen of Chic, Princess Diana will forever be a fashion icon. Designed by David Emanuel, her gown continues to inspire a new generation of brides.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being a Dadzilla
programme.desc: Alyssa calls her father 'Dadzilla,' and his opinions rule the day. Wedding planner Michelle feels extra pressure to find the perfect dress. When Emily's custom Pnina gown is all wrong, her dad 'Papazilla' demands a solution.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Want My Daughter to Look Like a Sexpot
programme.desc: Randy's mom visits for her 93rd birthday, and she's happy to share her fiery opinions with everyone shopping at Kleinfeld. Timid bride Courtney's appointment gets hijacked by her very provocative mother. Katie needs a gown suitable for two big secrets.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We're Going to Say 'I Do' Underwater!
programme.desc: Omarosa of 'The Apprentice' is determined to find a colourful, dramatic gown for her big day. Jet-setting bride Valerie wants a dress fit for her lavish Ibiza wedding. Randy rescues bride Magaly who needs a dress for her underwater ceremony!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa's dress vision is simple: it must show off her muscles. Shay may lose his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget. Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Pool Rules: No Spending
programme.desc: Homemaker Jeni Cox goes to sporting goods stores, using the exercise equipment on display in lieu of a gym membership. Realtor Lisa DiMercurio spends just three dollars to stage and sell her homes.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is
programme.desc: Flight attendant Steffanie takes her boyfriend to the Unclaimed Baggage Center in hopes of pushing their relationship to the next level. Professional doorman RJ Andrews has no fixed address but lives rent-free by house sitting 365 days a year.

programme.title: So Freakin Cheap: Rather Die Than Pay Retail
programme.desc: The Trans try to help their youngest daughter pursue her modeling dream in their own frugal fashion. The Watsons are planning their daughter's wedding on a $750 budget. The Guileses are trying to renovate their 100-year-old house as cheaply as possible.
