programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Modern Family: Manny Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at a restaurant to celebrate Manny's birthday, though Manny himself is experiencing a mini life crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Claire and Phil decide to engage in a not-so-friendly car race on the way to the restaurant.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother Tucker
programme.desc: When Cameron's larger-than-life mother comes to town, Mitchell doesn't know how to tell Cam that his mother makes him uncomfortable. Meanwhile, when Haley breaks up with Dylan, Phil takes it harder than anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dance Dance Revelation
programme.desc: It's Luke and Manny's first school dance, and everyone gets in on the fun. Jay and Phil take the boys to the mall, while Claire and Gloria are on the dance committee. Mitch and Cam are horrified to learn that Lily's been biting other children.

programme.title: Modern Family: Slow Down Your Neighbors
programme.desc: Claire hopes to catch and stop a menacing car that speeds though their streets. Phil tries to land an important listing with a difficult client. Jay teaches Manny how to ride a bike. Mitch and Cam have a new, flirty neighbour.

programme.title: Modern Family: Our Children, Ourselves
programme.desc: Claire and Phil want Alex to relax a little with her studies, but then start questioning their own intellectual drives. Gloria tries to befriend another nice couple, and Mitch and Cam run into an old female flame of Mitchell's.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Samantha hooks-up with a fireman only to have the flames put out; Charlotte dates a bully.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Politically Erect
programme.desc: Charlotte plans to find a husband; Carrie's politician boyfriend has a surprising request.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Attack of the 5'10" Woman
programme.desc: Carrie sees Big's wedding announcement; Charlotte struggles with her body image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Boy, Girl, Boy, Girl
programme.desc: Carrie is thrown for a loop by her 20-something boyfriend's intimate revelation.

programme.title: Sex and the City: No Ifs, Ands or Butts
programme.desc: Carrie faces a tough decision when she meets Aidan, who makes it clear that he can't be with a smoker. Charlotte is horrified by her boyfriend's kissing skills. Steve and Miranda fight over practising for a million-dollar basketball shot.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Are We Sluts?
programme.desc: Carrie wonders why her guy won't hit the sheets; Miranda discovers she has an STD.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Drama Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous about meeting Aidan's family; Charlotte meets a doctor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Time
programme.desc: Carrie bumps into Big at a party; Samantha fears menopause; Miranda breaks up with Steve.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: Charlotte prompts Trey to propose; Big encounters Carrie and Aidan at a furniture show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Last Walt
programme.desc: Claire delicately helps Luke cope with the fact that his friend and their old neighbour, Walt, has passed. Phil takes Alex for some father-daughter bonding time, and Haley throws an unauthorized party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Planes, Trains and Cars
programme.desc: Phil's judgment becomes clouded when he goes car shopping with his new buddy, Andre. Meanwhile, Jay is determined to get to his high school reunion with Gloria and Manny in tow, and Lily loses her favourite stuffed animal on a public metro train.

programme.title: Modern Family: Disneyland
programme.desc: Phil tries hard to keep up with Luke when the Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan visits Disneyland. Claire is shocked when they run into Dylan, and Jay and Gloria disagree about sensible shoes for the park.

programme.title: Modern Family: Tableau Vivant
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria get on each other's nerves while trying to order lunch at their local diner, Phil is put in the position of having to fire Mitchell, and Cam and Claire have opposing theories on how to discipline children.

programme.title: Modern Family: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Gloria accompanies Cam and Mitch as a translator for their newest adoption. Jay and Manny bring Lily to her dance recital, while Claire and Phil have a proud parenting moment when they send Alex off to her first prom.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Jay's birthday is coming up, and he makes it well-known that he wishes to keep it as low key as possible, while Gloria struggles with how to break her pregnancy news to him. Phil takes Jay on a very unconventional fishing trip with his buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: Schooled
programme.desc: The day has arrived for Phil and Claire to drop Haley off at college, which is a difficult moment for any parent. It's made worse when they manage to really embarrass Haley. Manny forces Jay and Gloria to take a baby class.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snip
programme.desc: Phil and Claire plan to vacation and enjoy life once Luke leaves for college, so Phil goes in for a vasectomy. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria disagree about whether or not to find out the sex of the baby. Mitch tries to steer Cam towards getting a job.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Butler's Escape
programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic but Phil cannot accept it. Gloria's new pregnancy symptoms include snoring and she is keeping the whole house up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Open House of Horrors
programme.desc: Claire has gone over the top with Halloween in the past, and the neighbours definitely don't share her enthusiasm. This year, she's being forced to tone it down and keep it 'kid-friendly.' Phil has an idea to hold an open house on Halloween night.

programme.title: Modern Family: Yard Sale
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria hold a yard sale to help Manny and Luke with their school's charity fundraiser, and the entire family pitches in.

programme.title: Modern Family: Arrested
programme.desc: Phil and Claire get the dreaded late night call that Haley has been arrested for under-aged drinking, so they bring Mitchell, the family lawyer, in tow to the police station.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mistery Date
programme.desc: When Claire takes Manny and Luke along to Alex's academic decathlon for the weekend, Phil attempts to throw together a boys' night at the house, inviting a fellow Bulldog alum he just met.

programme.title: Modern Family: When a Tree Falls
programme.desc: With some urging, Mitch joins in on Cam's efforts to save an old tree in the park.

programme.title: Modern Family: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Manny and Luke's little league team unexpectedly makes it into a playoff game, so Claire and Cameron scramble to find a location and decide to do a makeover on a rundown field.

programme.title: Modern Family: New Year's Eve
programme.desc: The family goes to a hotel in Palm Springs to celebrate New Year's, which turns out to be less than stellar. Everyone ends up doing their own thing, and Jay runs into Billy Dee Williams. Meanwhile at home, Haley and Alex watch over the kids.

programme.title: Modern Family: Party Crasher
programme.desc: With the baby coming soon, Jay and Gloria go to great lengths to throw Manny an extra special surprise party for his 14th birthday.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fulgencio
programme.desc: Gloria's mom and sister make the voyage from Colombia with baby names and family baggage. No one feels that Phil is able to help with the kids' problems, but there may be a method to his madness.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: BBQ Hacks
programme.desc: A true Master of 'Cue must have the ability to handle any challenge or cooking condition, so the competitors have to prove their ability to pivot. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson keep a close eye on their pitmasters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: During a busy "Old Home Day", Officer Delmer patrols the ATV trails. Officer McFazden rescues a trapped barred owl and takes it to be rehabilitated. On Mount Liberty, Officer Towne and trainee LaTourneau save an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Backseat Bear
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre and Arsenault confront a bear that has made its winter den in a car. Officer McKee investigates a claim that an illegal deer kill was an accident. Lt. Boudreau stops a family of snowmobilers riding illegally on a highway.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery
programme.desc: On Mt. Monadnock, a severed finger is found, sending a team and K-9 Wyatt to search for other possible body parts. A family of repeat offenders are found riding their ATVs without proper protective gear, and a man admits to an illegal bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Day of Triumph and Tragedy
programme.desc: The Kilchers take on some of the biggest jobs in homestead history as one team tries to pick up the historic Octagon building and move it to safety while another strives to finish Shane's multi-year cabin build before winter once again stops them cold.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Chasing Black Bear
programme.desc: The Kilchers scramble to complete the last big projects before winter. In a first, Otto buries a giant water tank to solve water shortage issues. Atz Lee and Atz Sr trek in search of black bear. Eivin builds a survival motorcycle outfitted with weapons.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Home Alone
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Kilchers film themselves. Eivin and Eve take their kids on an adventure to go crabbing. And Atz Lee and Jane prepare Shane's cabin for his recovery. Atz Senior helps a fellow veteran with a big build. Otto buries a pet.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Hunting Season Begins
programme.desc: Eve butchers chickens with her children to teach them about the circle of life. Eivin builds a shelter for his trusty horse to protect it from the freeze. Atz Lee and Jane warm up their remote cabin. Atz Sr. goes on a solo hunt in the remote Alaskan wild.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Double Hunt
programme.desc: Eve finds herself alone with a buck while hunting. Jane and Atz Sr. hunt elk, and Otto races a snowstorm while rounding up his cattle. Otto and Charlotte travel to Switzerland to see where the Kilcher family started and learn old building techniques.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: 5000 Miles Home
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte travel to Switzerland to discover the family origins and learn traditional building techniques. Atz Sr., Atz Lee and Jane honor a late friend while their kids keep the homestead running.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: New Frontiers
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin's hunt for Ptarmigan ends in disaster. Atz Lee and Jane search for caribou in Adak Island. Atz Sr. is lead to an abandoned barge by his pioneer spirit.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Predator Strikes
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte defend against predator attack. Atz Lee and Jane catch lake trout on Lake Louise. Atz R. renovates his floating homestead. Eve does more work while Eivin recovers from a broken rib.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Roll Yuletide Roll
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane help a fellow homesteader. Atz Sr. looks for a place to anchor his floating homestead. Otto, Eivin, and Levi rebuild a homestead hot tub. Charlotte protects her herd from predators.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Beach Is Burning
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin fight to douse a raging coal seam fire on Kilcher beach. Atz Sr. attempts the most unconventional bear hunt of his life. Jane and Charlotte take a girl's day adventure clamming.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Range Danger
programme.desc: Otto makes a calf caboose for his spring cattle drive. Atz Lee and Jane bring sustainable power to their remote cabin. Atz Sr. builds a smoker to preserve meat. Levi renovates his childhood cabin.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Money Mirage
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a tri-level house in Irvine, CA, buying it sight unseen. The neighborhood is hot, but the house needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Alarming Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina return to the street of a previous flip in Cypress, CA. When they can't agree on a design for the kitchen, they decide to settle the matter with a quick game of hoops.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Enamored by the View
programme.desc: When Tarek and Christina get a chance to flip a house with panoramic views of the ocean, they go all in. The cost to fix the foundation catches them by surprise, and the duo realize they may have been too distracted by the scenery to see all the problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on one of their biggest projects to date in Anaheim Hills, California, but modernizing this 90's mansion will cost them a fortune. If they don't get the design just right, it could jeopardize the profit and their big investment.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Unpermitted Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a home in Rowland Heights, CA, that's jam-packed with issues. There's a large pool in a small backyard, and unexpected additions create problems they've never seen before.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip
programme.desc: When a good deal pops up, Tarek and Christina check out a home in La Mirada, California. What looks to be a quick flip soon turns out to be more difficult, however.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Prickly Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a property overrun with cacti in Lakewood, California, but they can't see inside because tenants are still there! The duo returns to find a leaky water bed creating a huge mess that may endanger their profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Back House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bankrupt Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, CA. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Love It or List It: On Shaky Ground
programme.desc: A real estate broker on the lookout for the perfect family home spotted a diamond in the rough and convinced his wife to buy it. While he sees its unlimited potential, however, she can't see past the long list of fixes, including the cracked ceiling.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Functioning for Four
programme.desc: Mason and Shannon moved into their 2,000 square foot home in a neighborhood perfect to raise their young son, Luke. After adopting their teenage daughter, Carmen, they felt as though their house may be a little too small for a family of four.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Need for Efficiency
programme.desc: A couple loves the character of their 1960s home, but he wants something more energy efficient with space to expand their family.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Decades-long Debate
programme.desc: A couple's home is feeling more cramped than usual now that they have two teens. She's ready to ditch their choppy, dated home for a spacious property with no hassles. However, he loves their cozy house and hopes Hilary can reconfigure their space.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Right-Size Ranch Reno

programme.desc: Gabby gets sucked into a game of one-upmanship when her friend Mimi from Miami visits to celebrate their shared birthday.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Jessie: We Are So Grounded
programme.desc: Jessie, Bertram and the kids head to Bali for a family vacation, but when their private jet starts to fail, Jessie takes control of the cockpit and makes an emergency landing on a tropical island.

programme.title: Jessie: The Secret Life of Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: After finding a nest of eggs on the terrace, Jessie and Ravi discover that Mr. Kipling is really Ms. Kipling, and a mom-to-be. After misplacing her eggs, Ravi realizes he may have to work at becoming a better grandparent to baby lizards.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Muffler-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv is filming the 'sequel' to the muffler commercial she did when she was six. Meanwhile, Maddie is feeling nervous about her knee as she prepares for her first game back.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Neighbors-A-Rooney
programme.desc: During a neighbourly feud with the Dippledorfs, Liv rekindles an old friendship with Holden Dippledorf. Meanwhile, Joey becomes fascinated with a new member he meets at his weekly Intergalactic Council meeting.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: What Ifs and Where's Austin?
programme.desc: The gang imagines how their lives would be if they’d never met Austin.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Presidents and Problems
programme.desc: Following the last show of Austin’s tour, the gang does some sight-seeing at a Washington, D.C., museum, where Austin accidentally gets stuck to a priceless object and must find a way to return it before performing for the president.

programme.title: Jessie: Ride to Riches
programme.desc: Jessie is determined to get to an important audition, but she and Ravi end up on the 'Rides to Riches' game show where contestants can win prizes during their taxi ride.

programme.title: Jessie: Between the Swoon and New York City
programme.desc: Jessie hits it off with a new guy she meets in the park unaware that he is Ms. Chesterfield's son.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Backwarder
programme.desc: An old friend of Master Fu's, Marianne, gets akumatized into Backwarder. Armed with a magic wand, she wants to make up for lost time by stealing it from others! There's not a second to lose for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Reflekdoll
programme.desc: Juleka becomes Reflekta again. But this time, the supervillain is not alone, and Marinette and Adrien are having trouble with their Miraculous.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Bluey: Ice Cream/ Bad Mood/ Double Babysitter
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad. Two babysitters turn up to look after Bluey and Bingo!

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo play The Quiet Game. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate, Winnie.

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Hearthunter (The Battle of the Miraculous, Part 1)
programme.desc: Ladybug and Cat Noir face the Bourgeois couple. Now Hearthunter, a Cerberus with two heads, they devour all the love in Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Miracle Queen (The Battle of the Miraculous, Part 2)
programme.desc: Hawk Moth akumatizes Chloe into Miracle Queen to help her take control of all the Miraculous wearers.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Catalyst (Heroes' Day, Part 1)

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mayura (Heroes' Day, Part 2)
programme.desc: Hawk Moth has put his dreadful plan into action and re-akumatized all his former villains with Catalyst's help.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school. The girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad! Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The Heelers play a game of 'Bus'. Mum and Bluey play 'Mum School' where Mum teaches Bluey how to corral her rowdy kids. Bingo decides she’s too tired to walk and needs a piggyback.

programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.title: Snapped: Neola Robinson
programme.desc: The investigation into a missing mechanic sends Texas authorities on a wild goose chase that ceases at a dead end... until years later, when a new tip heats this cold case to a boil.

programme.title: Snapped: Sharon Maxwell
programme.desc: Firefighters battling a vehicle fire are horrified to discover a man's charred body at the base of the flames, and the ensuing investigation reveals a sinister murder plot that few in the small Texas town can fathom.

programme.title: Snapped: Jerrie Bryant
programme.desc: When a man goes missing in a rural small town in Tennessee, family members and detectives band together to uncover scandalous secrets fueled by greed and lust.

programme.title: Snapped: Kelly Harrod
programme.desc: After a beloved father vanishes, his family and the police work tirelessly for four years to find him, until a familiar witness comes forward, leading detectives to finally expose a diabolical conspiracy which may have been paid for by sexual favors.

programme.title: Snapped: Jordan Graham
programme.desc: When the body of a newlywed is spotted at the base of a cliff in Glacier National Park, local and federal authorities join forces for an investigation that will put their skills to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Snapped: Hannah Stone
programme.desc: When a devout single mother vanishes from her home, investigators fear she's been abducted by a group of teens hell-bent on a devilish plan... and race to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Execution Enigma
programme.desc: Investigators suspect foul play when they discover a mysterious body lying dead along a lonely stretch of New Mexico highway. But the bizarre trail of evidence only deepens the dark enigma surrounding a seemingly well-respected family man.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: An elderly matriarch is found dead in her home outside of Boston after an apparent accidental fall down her stairs. With the help of a confidential informant, police obtain shocking audio that reveals the painful truth behind her death.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Dose
programme.desc: In the early morning hours after Valentine's Day a man is found dead after an apparent drug overdose. But a jail informant gives investigators a tip that abruptly changes the case, and a deadly pattern of deaths in the family is revealed.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a rural Nebraska town when their beloved high school volleyball coach dies in a fiery car accident. But as investigators reconstruct her tragic death, the resulting clues steer the investigation to reveal a horrifying series of events.

programme.title: Dateline: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: Hollywood stuntman, Garrett Warren, was shot four times but luckily survived. With many suspects in mind, see if Warren knew who was trying to kill him.

programme.title: Dateline: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. Two hours after the murder, detectives get a lead from a 911 caller and discover the student's fiancé may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. Two hours after the murder, detectives get a lead from a 911 caller and discover the student's fiancé may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Fall
programme.desc: A Milwaukee contractor is shocked when he discovers a body in a shallow backyard grave. The ghastly remains send investigators chasing an atrocious truth and have a community running scared from their own neighbors.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deep in the Cornfields
programme.desc: Federal agents descend on a tiny Ohio town after a beloved girl goes missing. Fearing their cornfields harbor a terrible truth, theories abound and panic spikes in this serene community. It's a race against time as investigators close in on a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When a man and his dog make a disturbing discovery in a backyard beach, a series of horrifying events unfold in a sleepy South Carolina town. Investigators fear no one is safe as they desperately track a killer potentially hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The Imposter
programme.desc: A man goes missing from an idyllic Idaho town, leaving detectives puzzled and a daughter driven to find her father. As the investigation unravels, it reveals a truth that's stranger than fiction and a killer no one ever sees coming.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murders in Maine
programme.desc: When a young mother in Newport Maine goes missing, the case goes cold...until another mom suddenly vanishes, sparking an investigation that leads to a deadly game of cat-and-mouse and grisly discoveries in a rustic backyard.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Tangled Web
programme.desc: After a young woman vanishes from her neighborhood, North Carolina detectives are snared in a tangled web of deceit as they uncover a vicious love triangle. It's a race against time to find a killer and the evidence they need to solve a dark mystery.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: Young newlyweds Michael and Susan 'Missy' MacIvor were living the dream in the Florida Keys with a baby on the way. But the Florida Man strikes in paradise, when under the cover of a storm, the MacIvors become victims of a triple homicide.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Killer Succession
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes rocking the millionaire enclave of Naples, Florida. Tobacco heiress Margaret Benson and her son are victims of a double homicide. Her severely injured daughter clings to life, and may be the police’s only hope for an eyewitness.

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors
programme.desc: In a special anthology-style episode, Peter gets fired from his job at the brewery in the signature styles of three famous Hollywood film directors.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: MythBusters: Blow It Out the Water
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie blow up a boat with 1,000 pounds of high explosives before building a homemade machine gun from Breaking Bad's season finale.

programme.title: MythBusters: Hollywood Car Crash Clichés
programme.desc: It's wall-to-wall automotive mayhem as the MythBusters drive through glass, plough through traffic and fire an RPG at an SUV to take aim at classic Hollywood crash clichés.

programme.title: MythBusters: Bullet Baloney
programme.desc: The MythBusters take on five filmic firearm clichés: Will a bent-barreled shot gun fire? Can you fire a gun in space? Will a gun dropped in a deep fryer go off? What weird items will stop a bullet? And does a neon sign really explode when hit by a bullet?

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries of America
programme.desc: Behind the presidential faces of Mount Rushmore lies concealed secrets and the Statue of Liberty contains a dark enigmatic history. Experts use the latest science and technology to investigate and reveal undiscovered mysteries of American monuments.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Legend of the Covenant
programme.desc: The Ark of the Covenant is believed to possess a mythical power and stolen by the Knights Templar centuries ago. Now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path to uncover the truth behind its elusive journey.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Legend of the Covenant
programme.desc: The Ark of the Covenant is believed to possess a mythical power and stolen by the Knights Templar centuries ago. Now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path to uncover the truth behind its elusive journey.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Good, the Bad, and the Abandoned
programme.desc: The world's abandoned structures hold new evidence about the lives and deeds of history's greatest heroes and villains, and using the latest discoveries at these mysterious sites, experts count down the ten most significant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of Nuclear Secrets
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history. Experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. As days go by with no sign of the baby or demands for ransom, sergeants Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she's been sold on the black market or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: American Monster: By God, That's Enough
programme.desc: When single mom Michelle Chaffin finds love, it seems like the perfect case of opposites attract. But when Michelle vanishes without a trace, police uncover a terrible jealousy revealed through a shocking confession that leaves her family reeling.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: American Monster: Life in Florida
programme.desc: Wealthy and glamorous 72-year-old widow Jean Schwarzkopf is determined not to give up on life and is soon a fixture on the Florida social scene. But when Jean's new friends are not all they seem her family is drawn into a dark world of crime and violence.

programme.title: American Monster: Stay with Me
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and husband Greg Mulvihill live happily in southern California. But when accusations rock the marriage and a mysterious phone call ends with an attempted murder, police uncover the shocking truth behind this once dream couple.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: American Monster: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: The Laffertys are pillars of the Mormon community, and known as a flawless example of wholesome family values, as seen in these never-before-aired home videos. But an evil is lurking that - decades later - will explode into an unholy double homicide.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: She Made me Do It
programme.desc: As a boy, Eric Witte's father taught him to protect his family. But as his father grows increasingly violent, Eric realizes that he is the evil his family needs protection from.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Put on a Happy Face
programme.desc: Melissa Moore loved being daddy's little girl, and thought her father, Keith Jesperson, could do no wrong. As she got older, that admiration was replaced by fear, and then by the horror of learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Have To Do The Right Thing
programme.desc: When Tim Kreider discovered proof that his son, Alec, was responsible for a horrific crime, he knew what the right thing to do was.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies' man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder. But a shocking revelation will turn his attention to a far more nefarious band of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: Blood evidence is used in investigating the shooting death of a firearms enthusiast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Setup
programme.desc: Hardworking family man Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. To catch the killer, Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Bridge to Freedom
programme.desc: Nicholas Johnson was a teen robber who terrorized the streets of Portland, Oregon, but after getting caught, he planed an elaborate escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Fix Up
programme.desc: An Ohio couple is ready to trade in cold winters for the sunny skies of St. Petersburg, Florida. They find a fixer-upper with potential to be what they're looking for, but unforeseen structural issues threaten to throw a wrench in their plans.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Cape San Blas Bliss
programme.desc: A Dallas couple hunts for a beach retreat that's large enough to share with their family and friends in Cape San Blas, Florida. They find a bargain bungalow close to the water, but it comes with the price of needing a lot of work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Better With Bacon
programme.desc: Everything's better with bacon and Noah Cappe is here to prove it. Noah travels to festival and fairs across the country, Noah finds the biggest, baddest and best bacon dishes around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem for an Ice Cream

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward deliver Krabby Patty pizza; SpongeBob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Dark and Story Night/ Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Idol
programme.desc: Norm the genie is sick and tired of his lamp and wants to get out of the business. When he learns that any magical creature can apply for a fairy godparent posting if someone quits, he schemes to get Cosmo and Wanda to give up their jobs.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Beginning
programme.desc: Centuries ago, fairy ancestors hid a mystical wand on Earth that has the power to defeat The Darkness, but only the Chosen One depicted in the Fairy World prophecy can unlock its mysteries. Timmy gets chosen for the task, as he resembles the prophecy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Baby
programme.desc: When Timmy becomes aware of Cosmo and Wanda's desire to be parents, he wishes them up a baby. However, the Anti-Fairies and Pixies join forces to use the child to take over the world. Jorgen helps Timmy, Cosmo and Wanda save the day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Channel Chasers
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a magic remote control that will allow him to travel through television.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part
programme.desc: Timmy learns that to truly defeat The Darkness, he needs a second wand, which is located on the far side of the universe. The threat from the robotic Eliminators still remains as they have stolen Yugopotamia's Fake-i-fier technology.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Abra Catastrophe
programme.desc: It's the one year anniversary of Timmy having Cosmo and Wanda as his Godparents.

programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.
